properties.name: 2025 Subsidy Application — Operator Review
properties.description: Operator-facing review wizard for the 2025 Subsidy. The MetaWizardElement is configured with roleScreenId=REVIEWER_REVIEW; the screen list and per-tab read-only mask are derived from that mm_role_screen row's sectionsJson at render time. Same row in subsidy_app_2025 as the citizen submission. Configuration-as-code: change sectionsJson on the mm_role_screen row and the operator form re-shapes itself with no code change. Case-notes thread is configured as an mm_field with widget=note_thread on the OPERATOR_CASE_NOTES screen (added to REVIEWER_REVIEW.sectionsJson) — kernel synthesises a server-rendered card; no hand-authored HTML/JS in this form.
